title: Poojara Telecom is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Poojara Telecom is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
